summary: Health insurance claims can become stressful during emergencies. These 10 practical steps, from hospital admission to discharge, ensure faster cashless claim settlement, avoid delays, manage documents properly and reduce financial pressure, especially during emergencies.

title: From Form 26AS to contract notes: 6 tax documents every investor should preserve
summary: All investors should preserve key tax documents such as Form 26AS, AIS, TIS, contract notes and mutual fund statements. These records ensure accurate ITR filing and help verify income. They are necessary to claim tax benefits, calculate capital gains and handle tax notices.
